# Logical Investigations

*[Husserl](../philosophers/husserl.md) · 1901 · *Logische Untersuchungen**

The breakthrough work in which Husserl refutes psychologism, which reduced logical laws to laws of thinking, and restores the ideal objectivity of meaning, before opening the descriptive analysis of conscious experiences.
